Ordify
Explore the Ordify Suite, a carefully curated collection of products designed to elevate your investment experience across diverse blockchain networks. The suite comprises three key products: Launchpad, Bridge, and Wallet.
Basic Details
Token Chain
bnb
Total Supply
100,000,000
Listing Valuation
$11,000,000
Initial Circulating Supply
4.25%
Initial Market Cap
$467,456
Total Raise
N/A
Project Overview
Ordify serves as the gateway between the Bitcoin and Ethereum ecosystems. Its products aim to enhance user experience by offering early access to projects launching on either Bitcoin or EVM chains, while also providing a seamless transition between the two through a highly secure bridge. This is accomplished by leveraging both off-chain and on-chain technologies
Key Features
  1. An Omni-chain Launchpad - Ordify’s Launchpad connects and allows the community early access to high caliber projects on the following chains on both bitcoin and EVM : BRC20, Stacks, CoreDAO, Bitfinity, Syscoin, RolluxL2, Bools, Ethereum, Avalanche, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Zetachain. The Launchpad operates on a fair pool system which means users are able to stake-earn and stake-participate. Ordify’s launchpad becomes the first launchpad to integrate almost all of the Layer-2s built on bitcoin whilst still integrating support for EVM chains.
  2. Ordify’s wallet is a state-of-the-art non-custodial hot wallet storage safely secured for users to store their tokens, NFT’s, Ordinals, yet have access to their launchpad portfolio. What can you store? Ordify’s wallet supports Taproot, ERC20 and EVM chains as well as Bitcoin Layer-2s. You will be able to seamlessly create an account and login easily with biometric identification, downloaded from the app stores. Your wallet will store your NFTs and Ordinals and allow you to connect to NFT marketplace aggregates to sell them directly from the app.The primary focus here is that it scales the bitcoin ecosystem to provide extra utility whilst providing the opportunity for all users to participate. Ordify explores the integration of BRC-20, Stacks, and rootstock layers to be able to crowd fund and develop for each layer yet not being limited to the bitcoin ecosystem.
Business Model
Business to Business (B2B): The first revenue stream comes directly from the launchpad and that is charging business on every successful project launched on Ordify. Businesses planning to list their token on the ORFY bridge must purchase and stake a certain % of ORFY tokens, removing them directly from the supply generating gas fees to Ordify. The wallet will have advertised projects in app, for all web3 projects wishing for further exposure. Each Ad. placement charges businesses on a daily basis or depending on the package chosen. Business to Customer: Each time a user utilizes the ORFY bridge, they are charged a small fee of bridging. This allows for enhanced security as well as a revenue stream for Ordify.
